title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. supramontanum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. supramontanum, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly due to its flavonoid and terpenoid content, which may have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. supramontanum are thought to include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
